privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a synthetically generated corporate logo created in setup_task.sh at '/home/ga/Documents/initrode_logo.png'. The expected organization branding values (Name: 'Initrode Global', Address: '4120 Freidrich Ln, Suite 100, Austin, TX 78744', Email: 'support@initrode.com', Phone: '512-555-0199') are explicitly listed in the task description and are used directly by the verifier logic.
